review: Bought a ready office cabin to use as a temporary branch while our main premises were being renovated, and it solved the problem fast. What sold me was that it was genuinely ready — wiring points, lighting and the flooring were already done, so we just moved in our desks and started working the next day. The size suited a four-person team comfortably without feeling cramped. It's well sealed, so dust and noise from outside stay out, and it doesn't heat up the way I feared a metal cabin might. Delivered on schedule and the price was reasonable for how little hassle it gave us.
